title: A Self-Evolving Framework for Efficient Terminal Agents via Observational Context Compression
summary: As model capabilities advance, research has increasingly shifted toward long-horizon, multi-turn terminal-centric agentic tasks, where raw environment feedback is often preserved in the interaction history to support future decisions. Ho...
